MaskTransparentInOutNode.name: MaskTransparentInOutNode
MaskTransparentInOutNode.display_name: Mask Transparent In-Out (首尾透明过渡)

ImageResizeKJv2.name: ImageResizeKJv2
ImageResizeKJv2.description:
Resizes the image to the specified width and height.  
Size can be retrieved from the input.

Keep proportions keeps the aspect ratio of the image, by  
highest dimension.

ResizeMask.name: ResizeMask
ResizeMask.description: Resizes the mask or batch of masks to the specified width and height.

saturation_threshold.tooltip: 饱和度阈值，低于此值的像素视为灰色，不参与颜色统计

value_threshold.tooltip: 亮度阈值，低于此值的像素视为黑色，不参与颜色统计

non_flower_threshold.tooltip: 非绿色颜色存在阈值，低于此占比的颜色视为不存在

VHS_LoadVideo.name: VHS_LoadVideo
VHS_LoadVideo.description: Loads a video from the input folder

PreviewImage.name: PreviewImage
PreviewImage.description: 将输入图像保存到您的ComfyUI临时目录。

GrowMaskWithBlur.name: GrowMaskWithBlur
GrowMaskWithBlur.description:
# GrowMaskWithBlur
- mask: Input mask or mask batch
- expand: Expand or contract mask or mask batch by a given amount
- incremental_expandrate: increase expand rate by a given amount per frame
- tapered_corners: use tapered corners
- flip_input: flip input mask
- blur_radius: value higher than 0 will blur the mask
- lerp_alpha: alpha value for interpolation between frames
- decay_factor: decay value for interpolation between frames
- fill_holes: fill holes in the mask (slow)

LayerUtility: ImageBlendAdvance V2.name: LayerUtility: ImageBlendAdvance V2
LayerUtility: ImageBlendAdvance V2.display_name: 图层工具：图像混合(高级) V2

video.tooltip: The video to extract components from.

BAGetVideoComponents.name: BAGetVideoComponents
BAGetVideoComponents.description: Extracts all components from a video: frames, audio, and framerate.

saturation_threshold.tooltip: 饱和度阈值，低于此值的像素视为灰色，不参与颜色统计（降低可检测更多暗淡颜色）

value_threshold.tooltip: 亮度阈值，低于此值的像素视为黑色，不参与颜色统计（降低可检测更多深色）

presence_threshold.tooltip: 颜色存在阈值，超过此占比的颜色视为'存在'，将被禁止作为背景色

vivid_threshold.tooltip: 鲜艳度阈值，只有最大饱和度超过此值的颜色才会被自动禁用（低饱和度的颜色可作为兜底）

disable_red_bg.tooltip: 禁止使用红色作为背景色

disable_yellow_bg.tooltip: 禁止使用黄色作为背景色

disable_green_bg.tooltip: 禁止使用绿色作为背景色

disable_cyan_bg.tooltip: 禁止使用青色作为背景色

disable_blue_bg.tooltip: 禁止使用蓝色作为背景色

AutoChromaSmartBackground.name: AutoChromaSmartBackground
AutoChromaSmartBackground.display_name: Auto Chroma Smart BG (智能背景色)

image.tooltip: Input image to be processed for background removal.

model.tooltip: Select the background removal model to use (RMBG-2.0, INSPYRENET, BEN).

sensitivity.tooltip: Adjust the strength of mask detection (higher values result in more aggressive detection).

process_res.tooltip: Set the processing resolution (higher values require more VRAM and may increase processing time).

mask_blur.tooltip: Specify the amount of blur to apply to the mask edges (0 for no blur, higher values for more blur).

mask_offset.tooltip: Adjust the mask boundary (positive values expand the mask, negative values shrink it).

invert_output.tooltip: Enable to invert both the image and mask output (useful for certain effects).

refine_foreground.tooltip: Use Fast Foreground Colour Estimation to optimize transparent background

background.tooltip: Choose output type: Alpha (transparent) or Color (custom background color).

background_color.tooltip: Pick background color (supports alpha, use color picker).

GetImageSizeAndCount.name: GetImageSizeAndCount
GetImageSizeAndCount.description:
Returns width, height and batch size of the image,  
and passes it through unchanged.

VHS_VideoCombine.name: VHS_VideoCombine
VHS_VideoCombine.description: Combine an image sequence into a video

ImageConcanate.name: ImageConcanate
ImageConcanate.description: Concatenates the image2 to image1 in the specified direction.

color.tooltip: Color as RGB values in range 0-255 or 0.0-1.0, or color name or hex code

ImagePadKJ.name: ImagePadKJ
ImagePadKJ.description: Pad the input image and optionally mask with the specified padding.

GetImageSize.name: GetImageSize
GetImageSize.description: Returns width and height of the image, and passes it through unchanged.
